title: stelis schlimii
intro: Stelis schlimii, also known as the yellow stelis, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential treatment for wounds and infections. The health benefits of Stelis schlimii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Stelis schlimii is typically prepared as a tincture or decoction, and its herbal preparations have been used by traditional healers in the region to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
